Deep Technical Reference

For implementation details, architectural decisions, and extensibility, see the Architecture & Layer Reference documentation.

Key architecture documents:

  • Data Layer Reference — Data structures (BatchData, RouteData, SampleConfig)

  • Route Layer Reference — Distributed feature exchange patterns

  • Unified Preprocessing Pipeline — Preprocessing pipelines per graph mode

  • Protocol Reference — Protocol definitions (GraphBackend, TaskAdapter)

  • Unified Training Pipeline — PipelineEngine training loop

  • Artifact Format Reference — Artifact files and serialization

  • Reusable Model Modules — Reusable model components
